summary: Lane TC-006: Cleaned up TUI remnants. Removed dead @tui/* alias from tsconfig.json (target directory never existed). Documented @opentui/core, @opentui/keymap, @opentui/solid, opentui-spinner as test-only dependencies in package.json (confirmed zero src/ imports, only test/ usage). Recorded two out-of-scope findings: PluginKind "tui" as vestigial first-class kind, and TUI HTTP API server code needing audit. Preserved all pre-existing dirty file changes. Typecheck errors are all pre-existing.
friction_summary: Lane TC-006: smart_bun typecheck returned exit_code=2 with many pre-existing errors unrelated to lane changes. Verified
